ownership.rule: CAM_Codx owns generated host packs and workflow docs. CAM_CAM owns runtime behavior, MCP tools, CLI commands, and local databases.

source_docs_checked.label: Claude Code MCP
source_docs_checked.notes: Claude Code supports project .mcp.json files, local stdio servers, remote HTTP servers, deprecated SSE, WebSocket, plugins, and /mcp status checks.

source_docs_checked.label: Gemini API coding agents
source_docs_checked.notes: Google recommends Gemini Docs MCP plus Gemini API Skills for coding assistants.

source_docs_checked.label: Gemini CLI
source_docs_checked.notes: Gemini CLI uses local or remote MCP servers and exposes /mcp in supported Gemini Code Assist surfaces.

source_docs_checked.label: Gemini Remote MCP
source_docs_checked.notes: Remote MCP support must be rechecked for transport and model constraints before API claims are finalized.

source_docs_checked.label: Gemini CLI MCP configuration
source_docs_checked.notes: Gemini CLI settings.json uses mcpServers and supports stdio, SSE, and Streamable HTTP transports.

source_docs_checked.label: Grok Build
source_docs_checked.notes: Grok Build supports TUI use, headless mode, config inspection, and API use of grok-build-0.1.

source_docs_checked.label: Grok Build skills/plugins/hooks
source_docs_checked.notes: Grok discovers skills, plugins, hooks, MCP servers, AGENTS.md, and Claude Code compatibility files.

source_docs_checked.label: xAI Remote MCP
source_docs_checked.notes: xAI Remote MCP supports Streaming HTTP and SSE remote transports with allowed tool filtering and authorization headers.

capabilities.title: Pre-clone GitHub triage
capabilities.summary: Score a GitHub repo remotely before cloning and route it to clone, conditional clone, remote harvest, restricted harvest, watchlist, skip, or human review.
inputs: GitHub URL, owner/repo, or URL file
provenance_requirements: Record source URL and generated report path when used for a build decision.
capabilities.notes: CLI-only today; host packs should call it through shell or ask the user to run it before clone.

capabilities.title: Query CAM memory
capabilities.summary: Search CAM semantic/text memory for similar past solutions, patterns, and techniques.
outputs: ranked methodologies or text-search fallback results
provenance_requirements: Cite returned methodology identifiers or source labels before applying a pattern.

capabilities.title: Store a finding
capabilities.summary: Persist a discovered pattern, fix, or technique for future CAM reuse.
outputs: stored methodology or fallback insert result
provenance_requirements: Include source repo/path, verification command, and outcome before storing.

capabilities.title: Verify a code claim
capabilities.summary: Check a code assertion by scanning for placeholder and completion-risk patterns.
outputs: PASS, FAIL, or PARTIAL with violations
provenance_requirements: Pair verification output with the exact command/test evidence when claiming done.

capabilities.title: Request specialist routing
capabilities.summary: Recommend a specialist agent for a bounded subtask without executing the handoff.
provenance_requirements: Record selected agent and rationale before delegating.

capabilities.title: Route an agent
capabilities.summary: Host-pack alias for choosing Codex, Claude Code, Gemini, or Grok Build for a subtask.
provenance_requirements: Do not treat routing as execution; record the final handoff decision separately.

capabilities.title: Escalate to human review
capabilities.summary: Log that a task is beyond autonomous capability and needs human review.
provenance_requirements: Include blocker reason and evidence already tried.

capabilities.title: Decompose a task
capabilities.summary: Infer a CAM-SEQ archetype and slot graph for a build request.
provenance_requirements: Keep generated decomposition linked to the source task text.

capabilities.title: Build application packet
capabilities.summary: Build a CAM-SEQ application packet for a specific slot.
provenance_requirements: Record packet identifier and workspace path.

capabilities.title: Inspect run connectome
capabilities.summary: Return the stored connectome for a reviewed CAM-SEQ run.

capabilities.title: Trace failure
capabilities.summary: Trace a reviewed CAM-SEQ failure backward through its causal chain.

capabilities.title: Promote recipe
capabilities.summary: Promote a successful reviewed run into a compiled recipe.
provenance_requirements: Require reviewed run evidence and sample-size gate.

capabilities.title: Queue mining mission
capabilities.summary: Queue a durable mining mission from a reviewed run gap.
provenance_requirements: Record reviewed run, slot family, and gap reason.

capabilities.title: Request specialist packet
capabilities.summary: Request structured specialist packet recommendations with routing guidance.
provenance_requirements: Attach packet candidates to the handoff record.

capabilities.title: Export specialist exchange
capabilities.summary: Export a schema-versioned specialist handoff envelope to the file spool.
outputs: exchange id and request envelope path
provenance_requirements: Include allowed context, redaction summary, and deadline when present.

capabilities.title: Import specialist exchange
capabilities.summary: Import schema-versioned specialist replies from the file spool inbox.
provenance_requirements: Classify imported recommendations as Accepted, Rejected, or Needs Investigation before editing.

capabilities.title: List specialist exchanges
capabilities.summary: List durable external specialist exchange lifecycle records.
provenance_requirements: Use status filters when auditing handoff lifecycle.

capabilities.title: Bridge specialist exchange
capabilities.summary: Submit an existing exchange envelope to an external MCP tool and import its reply.
provenance_requirements: Treat external MCP output as untrusted until verified and imported through CAM's reply path.

capabilities.title: Submit specialist webhook
capabilities.summary: Submit an existing exchange envelope to a signed HTTPS webhook endpoint.
provenance_requirements: Never commit webhook secrets; record endpoint class and response receipt.

verification_commands: Ask Claude to call claw_query_memory and claw_verify_claim against a safe workspace.
claude-code.notes: Prefer project-scoped .mcp.json for teams and local scope for private paths or credentials.

verification_commands: Ask Gemini to call claw_query_memory and then summarize with source ids.
gemini.notes: Gemini CLI and Gemini API/Interactions are different surfaces; Remote MCP constraints must be rechecked before API claims.

verification_commands: grok --no-auto-update -p "Use CAM to query memory for retry patterns" --output-format json
grok-build.notes: Grok also reads Claude Code compatibility files; keep Grok-specific AGENTS.md explicit anyway.
